user.title: Add XeWe LED
user.description: Enter the IP address shown by the device on your network.

pair.title: Pair XeWe LED
pair.description: The device at {host} is in discovery mode. Submit to send the MQTT broker credentials to it automatically. Override the broker address only if the device cannot reach it.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device. Make sure it is still in discovery mode (press 'y' on the device to restart the 5-minute window), then try again.
error.no_broker: Could not determine a broker address reachable by the device. Enter one manually.

abort.no_mac: The device did not advertise a MAC address and cannot be identified.
abort.mqtt_not_configured: MQTT isn't set up yet, so we've opened MQTT setup for you (on Home Assistant OS, choose "Use the official Mosquitto MQTT Broker app"). Finish that, then add XeWe LED again.

mqtt_not_configured.title: XeWe LED requires MQTT
mqtt_not_configured.description: XeWe LED needs the MQTT integration. Add it under Settings → Devices & Services → Add integration → MQTT (on Home Assistant OS, choose "Use the official Mosquitto MQTT Broker app"), then reload XeWe LED.
